description_long: This object is a large, barrel-shaped wooden storage tank with a shingled, arched roof and a prominent metal chimney protruding from the top. The exterior is constructed from dark, horizontally-laid wooden planks, reinforced with metal bands, and it rests on two sturdy wooden beams for support. One end features a wide, open entrance with a small porch area, two built-in benches, and a wooden door leading into the interior. The opposite end has a large, rectangular window framed in wood, allowing light into the tank. The roof is covered in gray shingles, giving it a weather-resistant appearance, and the chimney suggests it may be heated or ventilated. The overall design resembles a rustic sauna or barrel house, blending utilitarian function with a cozy, inviting aesthetic.
description: A large, barrel-shaped wooden storage tank with a shingled roof, metal chimney, and open entrance with benches. Features a windowed rear and reinforced metal bands.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved wooden body, gray shingled roof, metal bands, and chimney.
description_view_1: Front view revealing the open entrance, two benches, and a wooden door inside.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the wooden planks and metal reinforcements.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a large rectangular window framed in wood and the shingled roof with chimney.
